title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: LIGHTHOUSE FOR KIDS CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical evaluations and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides community training and prevention education. 1230 Marine Drive Suite 301 Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 with suspected history of abuse Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 325-4977 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-4977 Hotline (877) 302-0077 DHS Child Abuse Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of legal custody LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIGHTHOUSE FOR KIDS
